event: View of the Church of Saint-Eustache in Paris
symbols: church building — the house of God and place of worship amid the city
narrow street leading to the church — the pilgrim's path, the journey toward the sacred
description: A watercolor painting depicting a view of the Church of Saint-Eustache in Paris from a narrow adjoining street. The massive Gothic-Renaissance facade of the church dominates the left side of the composition, with its buttresses, arched windows, and elaborate stonework rendered in warm grey and ochre tones. Adjacent buildings in the Parisian street crowd close on the right. A small splash of red and yellow — possibly an awning or banner — provides a note of color at street level. The sky above is rendered in loose, atmospheric washes of pale blue and cream.
